description: Adds 'Open Windows Terminal Here' (normal + admin) to the Windows right-click context menu.

messages.scriptDisabled: Windows Terminal context menu script is disabled in config.
messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.wtNotFound: '{command}' not found on PATH -- searching known locations...
messages.noExeFound: No WindowsTerminal executable found. Install WindowsTerminal first via 'install wt' (script 48).
messages.regDir: Creating context menu entry for FOLDERS...
messages.regBg: Creating context menu entry for FOLDER BACKGROUND...
messages.runasSet: HasLUAShield set -- UAC prompt will appear
messages.done: All Windows Terminal context menu entries created successfully!
messages.completedWithWarnings: Completed with some warnings -- check output above.
messages.setupComplete: Windows Terminal context menu setup complete.
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Registry entries removed, tracking purged.

commands.install: (default) Add 'Open Windows Terminal Here' (+ admin) registry entries
commands.uninstall: Snapshot affected HKCR keys to a .reg file, then remove the entries
commands.dry-run-uninstall: Preview uninstall (no snapshot kept beyond enumeration, no writes)
commands.--yes / -y: Skip the confirmation prompt for uninstall / restore (auto-approve)
commands.--non-interactive: Headless mode: refuses destructive ops unless --yes is also supplied
